title: Zuwziym #2104
definition:
Zuzim = "roving creatures"

 1) an ancient people of uncertain origin, perhaps, inhabitants of
    ancient Ammon east of the Jordan
nasbUsage:

 1) an ancient people of uncertain origin, perhaps, inhabitants of
    ancient Ammon east of the Jordan

    NASB:  a people E. of the Jordan
